setBonus: 2 of Set: Contender's Surprise — At the start of combat, a random stat is increased by 2000 for 10 seconds.

name: Wootz Kalkan · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment. Purified Black Ice, Shield, Heavy, Off-Hand.

name: Cincture of Atropal Essence
setBonus: 3 of Set: Whenever you gain health, you gain Temp HP equal to 25% of the health gained, to a total of 5% of your health. (30 second cooldown)
notes: Artifact Equipment. Reinforced slot. Source: Cradle of the Death God.

name: Mantle of Atropal Essence
notes: Artifact Equipment. Reinforced slot. Source: Cradle of the Death God.

equipBonuses.name: Death's Endowment
equipBonuses.description: When you slay your target with an attack's damage that is more than 25% of your Maximum Hit Points, an endowment from the dead will appear near you. When picked up by you or an ally, the endowment will increase a random stat by 1000 for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Victim's Parry
equipBonuses.description: When you are hit at 25% health or lower, your Deflect increases 15% for 5 seconds. If you have less than 10000 Deflect, you will gain 7500 for 5 seconds instead. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Victim's Resistance
equipBonuses.description: When you are hit at 25% health or lower, your Critical Avoidance increases 15% for 5 seconds. If you have less than 3000 Critical Avoidance, you will gain 2000 for 5 seconds instead. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Swordsman's Perk
equipBonuses.description: Your Melee Powers do 3% more damage.

equipBonuses.name: Manticore's Mane Bite
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, the next enemy that attacks you takes damage equal to 50% of your max health (30 second cooldown). In PvP this damage is reduced to 10% of your max health.

equipBonuses.name: Protector's Focus
equipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP, your Critical Strike is increased by 1000.

equipBonuses.name: Encounter Perk
equipBonuses.description: Your Encounter Powers do 3% more damage.

equipBonuses.name: Tit for Tat
equipBonuses.description: Your At-Will and Encounter Powers do 30% more damage, but your Daily Powers do 30% less damage.

equipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Focus
equipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Critical Strike for each enemy you have engaged in battle. (Max of 15 targets)

equipBonuses.name: Fanged Vex
equipBonuses.description: When you use an encounter power, the next enemy that attacks you takes damage equal to 5% of your max health. (10 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Sniper's Perk
equipBonuses.description: Your Ranged Powers do 3% more damage.

equipBonuses.name: Charged Might
equipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Power is increased by 1000.

equipBonuses.name: At-Will Perk
equipBonuses.description: Your At-Will Powers do 3% more damage.

equipBonuses.name: Victim's Belief
equipBonuses.description: When you are hit at 25% health or lower, your Incoming Damage is decreased by 10%, but your Base Damage boost is decreased by 10%. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Blessed Land
equipBonuses.description: At the start of combat, an area of land near you will be blessed for 30 seconds. While standing in this area, gain 5% Base Damage Boost and -5% Incoming Damage. (This power does not stack.)

equipBonuses.name: Sniper's Fury
equipBonuses.description: Your Powers deal .5% more damage when you are 50' or further away from your target.

equipBonuses.description: Your Powers deal 1.5% more damage when you are 50' or further away from your target.
